ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the project was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the project */,
  "screenshot_url" TEXT /* URL of the project's screenshot */,
  "comments_count" INTEGER /* Number of comments associated with the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed, archived) */,
  "project_type" TEXT /* Type of the project (e.g., video, animation, interactive experience) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for the project */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "team_size" INTEGER /* Number of team members working on the project */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Last date and time the project was modified */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., content creator, reviewer, admin) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date and time the user logged in */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the user's account is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the user has admin privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the comment is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text content of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the comment was created */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for nested comments) */,
  "edited_at" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was last edited */,
  "edited_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last edited the comment */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the comment is deleted */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was deleted */,
  "deleted_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who deleted the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_edited_by FOREIGN KEY ("edited_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_deleted_by FOREIGN KEY ("deleted_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., active, completed, archived) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "color_code" TEXT /* Color code to visually represent the status in the UI */,
  "can_be_reverted" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if a project can be reverted to this status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of what changes were made in this version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created this version */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if this is the current version of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_versions_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project for which analytics are recorded */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views for the project */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes for the project */,
  "shares" INTEGER /* Number of shares for the project */,
  "comments_count" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the project */,
  "ratings_count" INTEGER /* Number of ratings given to the project */,
  "average_rating" TEXT /* Average rating of the project */,
  "engagement_score" TEXT /* Calculated score representing overall user engagement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., content creator, reviewer, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role's responsibilities */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON column to store a list of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the attachment belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the attachment */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the attachment was uploaded */,
  "file_size" TEXT /* Size of the attachment file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the attachment file (e.g., PDF, DOCX) */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attachments_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attachments_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "assigned_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who assigned the role */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_assigned_by FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was created */,
  "seen_at" TEXT /* Date and time the notification was seen by the user */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the notification has been read */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of the notification (e.g., comment, approval, deadline) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
